title: centaurium quadrifolium subsp. parviflorum
intro: Centaurium quadrifolium subsp. parviflorum, also known as small-flowered centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurium quadrifolium subsp. parviflorum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the digestive system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties.
